rules.description: ¢ Power-control button and power-on LED: Press this button to turn the server on and off manually. The

rules.component: states of the power-on LED are as follows
rules.description: Off: Power is not present or the power supply, or the LED itself has failed.

rules.component: states of the power-on LED are as follows
rules.description: Flashing rapidly (4 times per second): The server is turned off and is not ready to be turned on. The

rules.component: states of the power-on LED are as follows
rules.description: Flashing slowly (once per second): The server is turned off and is ready to be turned on. You can
。 System-locator button/LED: Use this blue LED to visually locate the server among other servers. A
¢ Check log LED: When this yellow LED is lit, it indicates that a system error has occurred. Check the event
